title: IT Manager -TK
description:
• Permanent role
  • AWS + Variable Bonus
  • Hybrid work mode (1 day work from home)

IT Manager

A MNC company is hiring for an IT Manager to support its growing Asia Pacific operations.

This role sits within the Asia Regional ICT Hub, collaborating closely with HQ in Japan to deliver IT governance, security, training, and audit support across the region.

The IT Manager will serve as the key person-in-charge for IT End-User Support, Network Operations, and Information Security, providing direct support to the Singapore office and co-supporting multiple group companies across Asia Pacific. The role also acts as Information Security Lead, supporting cybersecurity initiatives and compliance activities.

Team Management experience is not required for this role.

Reporting to: ICT General Manager (Total 4 person in IT team)

Job Responsibilities:

  • Provide L1/L2 end-user IT support, including onboarding/offboarding, incident management, asset management, and user training

  • Manage IT service levels, vendors, audits, and documentation

  • Oversee office and regional network infrastructure (LAN, WAN, VPN, firewalls, Wi-Fi)

  • Monitor, maintain, and enhance network performance and security

  • Lead and support information security initiatives, risk assessments, training, and incident response

  • Collaborate with HQ and regional stakeholders to ensure compliance with group IT and security standards

Job Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in IT, Computer Science, or related field

  • Minimum 7 years of hands-on experience in end-user support, network administration, and basic security operations

  • Experience working in Japanese companies will be an added advantage

  • Strong experience with Microsoft 365, Azure AD, Windows, iOS, networking technologies, and security practices

  • Experience working in regional or global IT environments is an advantage

  • Strong communication, teamwork, and customer-service mindset


Interested applicants, please send your resume to Tiffany Koh (R1104633) tiffany@pasona.com.sg with email subject header "Job Application for IT Manager - TK " .

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified. Other applications will be updated to our database for future job opportunities.

By submitting any resumes or applications to Pasona Singapore Pte Ltd, you are considered to have read and agreed on the terms of our Privacy Policy, and consented to us collecting, using, retaining, disclosing your personal information to the prospective employers for their consideration.

Please find our Privacy Policy Agreement from the below link.

http://www.pasona.com.sg/privacy.html

Thank you for your kind understanding and co-operation.

Pasona Singapore Pte Ltd

― Who Are We? ―
Pasona Singapore Pte. Ltd., a wholly-owned subsidiary of Pasona Inc. (Japan), was established in 1984, a leading Japan-based recruitment firm in Singapore with experience over 35 years. We have a strong network of 15 countries and 59 other overseas branches across the world (as of July, 2020) and provide not only placement services but also deliver various types of HR-related services in high quality.


― For Job Seekers ―
Pasona’s goal is to introduce jobs where our candidates can make use of their skills and experiences. We will support you through career consultation, introducing suitable jobs and until your first working day.

Please register with us online which enables you to apply for current opening jobs and receive new vacancies if you are suitable candidates.
